title: Solana Payments for Digital Products Explained for Digital Creators: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Digital creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, and other restricted countries struggle with PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip KYC requirements, banking limitations, or geographic restrictions. They need a solution to sell ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and other digital products without these hurdles. Here's how Solana payments can help. Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) allows seamless integration with Solana and other blockchains for instant transactions, making it easier than ever to monetize digital creations, no matter where creators are based.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Solana payments leverage the Solana blockchain to facilitate fast, secure, and low-cost transactions for digital products. Unlike traditional payment processors, Solana doesn't require Know Your Customer (KYC) verification or charge exorbitant fees. This makes it an attractive option for creators operating in restricted markets or those who want to offer their products in cryptocurrency. By using Solana, creators can reach a broader audience and increase their sales without worrying about the complexities of traditional payment systems.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Web3 Wallet Connect integrates with the Solana blockchain to enable instant transactions using multi-chain QR codes. This means buyers can pay for digital products in a variety of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, SOL, and over 300 other coins. The Solana blockchain ensures secure, fast, and reliable transactions, eliminating the need for intermediaries and reducing the risk of chargebacks and fraud. When a buyer makes a purchase, the payment is processed automatically, and the creator receives the funds in their wallet.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is designed for digital creators who face payment restrictions or want to tap into the cryptocurrency market. This includes artists, writers, designers, developers, and anyone else who sells digital products. By using Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can bypass traditional payment processors and sell their products directly to customers, keeping more of their earnings and expanding their customer base.
Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) eliminates the need for intermediaries and reduces transaction fees.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Solana blockchain, Web3 Wallet Connect, and NOWPayments payment processor are the key components that make Solana payments work. The Solana blockchain provides fast and secure transactions, while Web3 Wallet Connect enables seamless integration with the blockchain and multi-chain QR code generation. NOWPayments facilitates payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies, ensuring that creators can accept a wide range of payment options. When a buyer makes a purchase, the payment is processed automatically, and the creator receives the funds in their wallet.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with Solana payments, digital creators can visit Unchained Commerce's Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and explore the Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) integration. They can also set up a new NOWPayments account and configure their Solana wallet to receive payments. By following these steps, creators can start selling their digital products in cryptocurrency and reach a broader audience without the limitations of traditional payment systems.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Yes, you can sell ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and other digital products without PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip using Solana payments. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) makes it easy to integrate with the Solana blockchain and accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies. By using NOWPayments as the payment processor, creators can bypass traditional payment processors and keep more of their earnings.
Solana payments offer faster and more secure transactions than traditional payment systems.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products in cryptocurrency, follow these steps: Set up a Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) account and integrate it with your Solana wallet. Configure NOWPayments as your payment processor. Create a new Solana wallet to receive payments. Add your digital products to the Unchained Commerce Shop or your own website. Promote your products to your audience and start selling.
Unchained Commerce's Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html provides a seamless integration with Solana and NOWPayments.
